title: RuntimeReceipt
description: CIAF-LCM runtime receipt for AI inference, tool use, or agent action.

receipt_type.description: Type of runtime event being receipted

event_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonicalized event record.

actor_id.description: Identity of the actor (agent, human, service) performing the action

model_id.description: Model identifier if this is an inference event

correlation_id.description: Correlation identifier for tracing across systems

session_id.description: Session identifier for grouping related events

signature.description: Cryptographic signature proving authenticity and integrity
